title: K&F CONCEPT 49mm Black Diffusion 1/4 Filter Mist Soft Glow Diffuser Lens Filters(Nano-K Series)
features: Reduces highlights and lowers glare: Black diffusion 1/4 filter creates a soft quality of light and pastel effect, soften wrinkles and blemishes while maintaining skin tone values.
HD AGC optical glass: Reducing reflections coming from the filter itself, keeping the real colour.
18-layer nano-coating: The anti-reflection green Dust-proof, waterproof, and anti-mildew to protect the lens.
No vignetting: The frame is made of aircraft grade aluminium and only 3.3mm in thickness, no dark corners.
3 microfibre cleaning cloths are included: Vacuum packed, tightly woven microfiber material, lint free, 100% safe for cleaning.
description: Product Description Portraits Enhance Dark & Shadow Details Portraits photography is characterized by the ability to enhance dark and shadow details in photos, while softening skin texture and reducing reflections of highlights in photos, creating a warm, soft, romantic atmosphere.
